title: Велосипед
shutter: 1/200 action-safe; 1/120 cinematic only on smooth roads
nd: None for rough routes; ND8–16 for controlled smooth riding
cons: Fast shutter has crisp action look
mistakes: ND plus slow shutter on rough trails
tips: Two schools exist: 1/120 for blur on smooth roads, ~1/200 for reliable EIS on vibration.
